publicSite.homeTitle: A temporary public landing page with room for the real index later.
publicSite.homeDescription: This is a lightweight placeholder for the public homepage. You can replace these blocks later with the final index content.
publicSite.tripListPageDescription: Public trip pages generated from backend data.
publicSite.tripTemplateDescription: This detail page is intentionally sparse for now. Replace the placeholder sections with the final trip presentation later.
publicSite.sectionPlaceholder: Placeholder content for the final public trip page.
publicSite.contentEmpty: This trip does not have any published content yet.

login.title: Admin login
login.subtitle: Sign in with Google to access admin pages.

adminHome.title: Administration
adminHome.subtitle: Choose a section to manage application access or edit trip content.
adminHome.usersDescription: Review which Google accounts can access the administration area.
adminHome.tripsDescription: Create and edit trip records, planning fields, and BlockNote content.
adminHome.activitiesDescription: Manage Strava-linked activities and their map data.
adminHome.galleryDescription: Upload reusable images for BlockNote and copy public image URLs.

adminUsers.title: Admin Users
adminUsers.subtitle: Authorized Google accounts that can access administration pages.

gallery.title: Global Image Gallery
gallery.description: Upload reusable JPG or PNG images to Firebase Storage. Use copied URLs inside BlockNote image blocks.
gallery.filesHelp: Supported formats: JPG and PNG. You can select multiple files.
gallery.filesRequired: Select at least one image to upload.
gallery.resizeInvalid: Resize width and height must be positive integers.
gallery.empty: No images in the gallery yet.

activities.title: Activities
activities.emptyPublic: No activities are linked to this trip yet.
activities.selectPrompt: Select or create an activity to begin editing.
activities.name: Activity name
activities.descriptionHelp: Optional BlockNote description stored as JSONB.
activities.invalidNumber: Numeric fields must contain valid non-negative values.

activityPhotos.title: Activity Photos
activityPhotos.description: Upload JPG or PNG photos for this activity, copy their URLs, and adjust the display order.
activityPhotos.empty: No photos uploaded for this activity yet.
activityPhotos.emptyTrip: No activity photos are available for this trip yet.
activityPhotos.saveActivityFirst: Save the activity first before uploading photos.
activityPhotos.filesHelp: Supported formats: JPG and PNG. You can select multiple files.
activityPhotos.filesRequired: Select at least one photo to upload.
activityPhotos.resizeInvalid: Resize width and height must be positive integers.

trips.title: Trips
trips.selectPrompt: Select or create a trip to begin editing.
trips.storyDescription: The trip body is stored as BlockNote JSON in the trip content field.
trips.metricsConfigInvalid: Metrics config must be valid JSON.
trips.plannedDistanceInvalid: Planned distance must be a non-negative number.
trips.zoomInvalid: Zoom must be an integer between 0 and 19.
